---
title: "play_with_git"
format: html
editor: visual
author: Nils
---

# Use this to play with git and github

I can explore \* revert \* reset \* checkout

Let's make this one committed

#To see all info about your credentials and current repo #note that before you connect to GitHub the first time, it won't know about branches etc usethis::git_sitrep()

#github is essentially creating a parallel version of your repository, tracking all of your commits.

Hiiiiiiii Nils

pull early and often.

## test modification

<<<<<<< HEAD
no THIS is the real file
=======
okay, this is the real test now
>>>>>>> b780ff5ef93af1e5b0acdb73537e96c5d4555478
